Bob was born in Jacksonville, Texas on August 12, 1935 to Larue and Emma Lena McCorkle Cox and lived in East Texas during his childhood years. obituaries.name: Johnny Joe Gomez
obituaries.summary: Johnny Joe Gomez August 1, 1953 — February 18, 2026 Robinson Johnny Joe Gomez, 72, of Robinson, Texas passed away on February 18, 2026. He was born on August 1, 1953 in McGregor, Texas. Johnny went to school in Ogelsby. He enjoyed fishing and was a truck driver for twenty - five plus years. Johnny is preceded in death by his wife, Vicki Vasquez Gomez and his mom and dad, Carmen and Fred Gonzales. Bernadine and her family moved to Waco as her father searched for work during the Great Depression. She attended and graduated from Waco High School where she met her eventual husband, Foy Wallace Watson, Jr. They were married on April 21, 1947 following his return from Pacific service with the US Navy in World War II.
